name: hagen-personal-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for content creation, media generation, and development tools

plugins.name: content-creator
plugins.description: Media generation pipeline — images, voice, slideshows, NSFW content, and Instagram scheduling via Replicate, Modal, and Late API.

plugins.name: swiftui-designer
plugins.description: Design, create, and improve SwiftUI views with iterative visual preview capture, design analysis, and code validation.

plugins.name: asc-iap-manager
plugins.description: Manage App Store Connect in-app purchases and auto-renewable subscriptions — create, list, price, localize, and delete IAPs.

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Automate browser interactions, fill forms, take screenshots, scrape web pages, and test web UIs via programmatic browser control.

plugins.name: aso
plugins.description: App Store Optimization intelligence — MCP tools and skills for keyword research, competitor analysis, and metadata optimization.
